input.command:
cat > /tmp/verify_logos.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Verifying Token vs Chain Logos..."
echo ""

echo "NATIVE TOKEN LOGOS (what users see for ETH/MATIC):"
echo "  ETH on Ethereum: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png"
echo "  ETH on Base: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png"
echo "  ETH on Arbitrum: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png"
echo "  ETH on Optimism: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png"
echo "  MATIC on Polygon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/matic.png"

echo ""
echo "CHAIN LOGOS (shown beside chain name):"
echo "  Ethereum: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/ethereum/info/logo.png"
echo "  Base: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/info/logo.png"
echo "  Arbitrum: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/arbitrum/info/logo.png"
echo "  Optimism: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/optimism/info/logo.png"
echo "  Polygon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/polygon/info/logo.png"

echo ""
echo "Testing ETH logo:"
curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png" | grep "HTTP" | head -1

echo ""
echo "Testing MATIC logo:"
curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/matic.png" | grep "HTTP" | head -1

echo ""
echo "✅ Token logos show the actual token (ETH, MATIC, etc.)"
echo "✅ Chain logos show beside the chain name (Ethereum, Base, etc.)"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/verify_logos.sh
/tmp/verify_logos.sh
